In the Name of Jesus, I speak to my body and command my thoughts about food to line up with good nutrition. I bind my spirit of lust for sugar, pork, blood, too much meat, junk foods, and all other unhealthy foods.

I speak to my body and command my metabolism to become perfectly normal - digestive organs. I command you to work as they were meant to work, in the Name of Jesus.

I speak to my appestat and command it to be healed at the upper limits, In the Name of Jesus. I will no longer experience a ferocious appetite or be tempted to go on eating binges.

I say appetite, that you will learn to love pleasant bread you will eat willingly, without murmuring for the Glory of God and the sake of the Kingdom in the Name of Jesus.
